# ClawLink - AI Agent Integration Platform

One command to add 40+ integrations to OpenClaw. Connect Gmail, Slack, Notion, WordPress, Stripe, GitHub, and more — zero config.

## Website: https://claw-link.dev

### Main Pages
- Home (/) - Landing page with features, integrations, pricing
- Dashboard (/dashboard) - Manage your connected integrations
- Sign In (/sign-in) - User authentication
- Sign Up (/sign-up) - Create account
- Docs (https://docs.claw-link.dev) - Full documentation

## Documentation: https://docs.claw-link.dev

### Getting Started
- Introduction - What is ClawLink
- Quick Start - Get started in 5 minutes
- OpenClaw Setup - Install plugin, create API key, log in from chat
- How It Works - Technical overview

### Dashboard Guide
- Dashboard Overview - Navigate your dashboard
- Integrations - Connect and manage services
- Request Logs - Monitor API usage
- Settings - Configure your account

### Integration Categories

#### Communication
- Gmail - Send, read, manage emails
- Slack - Send messages, manage channels
- Discord - Bot messaging, server management
- Microsoft Teams - Team communication
- Telegram - Bot API integration

#### Productivity
- Notion - Pages, databases, blocks
- Google Docs - Document creation
- Google Sheets - Spreadsheet data
- Calendar - Event management

#### Developer Tools
- GitHub - Repos, issues, PRs
- GitLab - DevOps platform
- Jira - Project tracking

#### Payments
- Stripe - Payments, customers, invoices

#### CRM & Sales
- HubSpot - CRM, marketing automation
- Salesforce - Enterprise CRM

#### AI & ML
- OpenAI - GPT models, embeddings
- Anthropic - Claude models

### Security
- Encryption at rest (AES-256-GCM)
- Credentials never in plaintext
- Per-request decryption
- Environment isolation

### Troubleshooting
- Common errors and solutions
- API key setup
- Integration connections

## Key Features
- One-command setup
- 40+ pre-built integrations
- Secure credential storage
- Usage monitoring
- Dashboard management
- Team collaboration

## Pricing
- Free tier available
- Usage-based billing
- Per-request pricing

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/hith3sh/clawlink
- Support: Check docs or open GitHub issue

Last updated: 2026-04-03
